steps.title: Break down the cost structure
steps.content: The company charges $195 for the first hour plus $75 for each additional hour plus gas cost $w$. Since $x$ is the total number of hours rented, the number of additional hours is $(x - 1)$.

steps.title: Write the total cost equation
steps.content:
Sum all three components:

$$y = 195 + 75(x-1) + w$$

This matches choice A — A is correct.
